metadata.releaseNotes:
We update Truecaller weekly to ensure it runs perfectly on your iPhone.

This update includes performance optimizations and bug fixes.
metadata.description:
With Truecaller, you can easily identify and block spam calls or SMS and search for unknown numbers. Leveraging AI pattern analytics with community-based spam classifications from over 450 million users and offering a range of thoughtfully designed features, Truecaller ensures the safety and security of your communication like no other app.

#1 CALLER ID & SPAM BLOCKING APP WORLDWIDE

• An all new Caller ID experience on iPhone with iOS 18.2 and above
• Automatically identify spam, fraud, and robocalls before you pick up
• View & search previously identified calls in the Phone app
• Take advantage of the best spam call blocker for iPhone
• Enable spam identification and blocking by accessing Settings > Apps > Phone > Call Blocking & Identification
• A paid subscription is required to access this feature

TRUECALLER ASSISTANT: AI-POWERED CALL SCREENING*

• It uses machine learning and speech-to-text technology to ask questions to the caller, helping you find out who they are and the rea

reviews.author: Vignesh_91
reviews.title: Greedy & Fraudulent
reviews.content:
Never you can identify the caller with iPhones but with Any Android device there is access at all times 
Why such greediness? 
In What Aspects Android Users get that privilege than iPhone users ? You people assume just because people who own iPhones wouldn’t care to spend lavish! Its has be same at all aspects 
If Android users have free access then so does the iPhone users and if iPhone users need to pay for even the basic services then so should the Android users 
Stop being a biased cheap mentality people

reviews.author: Atul Jadham
reviews.title: It Is a fraud company
reviews.content: Their management of payment is very bad. I purchased the individual plan and then upgraded to a family plan after  10 days. Truecaller said that they will refund the balance amount of individual plan. The refunded for the family plan but still my individual plan is not active. I'm raising a cybercrime complaint against them

reviews.author: it99338
reviews.title: Subscription app pretending to be a free app
reviews.content:
Useless on iPhone. Nothing works without a paid subscription.
Fully subscription app pretending to be a free app.

App which harvested and uses YOUR phonebook data and YOUR contribution and reporting to work, paywalls said functionality forgetting what it is built on.

reviews.author: vijaykb03
reviews.title: Too much self-promotion
reviews.content: I’m tired of the constant “Buy Premium” notifications. It’s becoming as annoying as the spam calls i downloaded it to identify and block. Given that official caller ID services are becoming a standard free feature in India, ₹899 to 4,999/year for various plans is way too unprofessional and expensive. I’m considering uninstalling if the notification frequency doesn’t drop.

reviews.author: Abaazzz
reviews.title: Incorrect ID of my personal number.
reviews.content: I like Truecaller honestly but there is one huge issue that my personal number has been getting identified as a business spam. I have had my personal number for at least 15 years but somewhere down the line algorithms messed it up. Even purchased premium thinking maybe this will help me correct my ID when I call someone. But it didn’t. Not sure what else Truecaller needs to show my name instead of a random business.
